name: pet-asistente
description: Desktop pet assistant — Electron frontend + Python backend + Ollama AI

scripts.install:all: cd desktop && npm install && cd renderer && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,desktop "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:desktop"
scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:backend
scripts.release: npm run build && npm run pack
